case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. JESSE LEWIS

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, JESSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2791 16TH STREET, ROOM #70, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94110 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ( RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELED )SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.43 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, JESSE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. SERVED APR-04-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, JESSE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, JESSE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, JESSE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, JESSE
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, JESSE
